message:
Add large JSON stress tests: real APIs + synthetic up to 1MB

Tests all 5 parser APIs (parse, createParser, createEventParser,
parsePartialJson) with both string and Uint8Array input against:
- JSONPlaceholder /posts, /comments, /photos (up to 1MB)
- Synthetic payloads: nested objects, tool-call arrays, escape-heavy
  strings, 10K-number arrays, 500KB stress payloads
- Streaming mid-stream getValue() correctness
- EventParser onDelta string collection on large payloads

files.patch:
@@ -28,7 +28,7 @@
     "build:types": "bun x tsc --emitDeclarationOnly",
     "build:js": "bun build src/js/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --minify --sourcemap=external && bun run build:types",
     "build": "bun run build:zig && bun run build:opt && bun run build:js",
-    "test": "bun test/phase1.mjs && bun test/phase2.mjs && bun test/parse-result.mjs && bun test/is-complete.mjs && bun test/partial-json.mjs && bun test/zerocopy.mjs && bun test/standards.mjs && bun test/event-parser.mjs && bun test/live-doc.mjs",
+    "test": "bun test/phase1.mjs && bun test/phase2.mjs && bun test/parse-result.mjs && bun test/is-complete.mjs && bun test/partial-json.mjs && bun test/zerocopy.mjs && bun test/standards.mjs && bun test/event-parser.mjs && bun test/live-doc.mjs && bun test/large-json.mjs",
     "bench": "bun --expose-gc bench/parse-stream.mjs",
     "bench:parse": "bun --expose-gc bench/parse-stream.mjs",
     "bench:e2e": "bun --expose-gc bench/end-to-end.mjs",
